title: jurinea leptoloba
intro: Jurinea leptoloba, also known as Kresten, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Jurinea leptoloba include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as relief from pain and inflammation. Jurinea leptoloba can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in tincture and essential oil forms.
